allow: PowerShell(node --version; npm --version; git --version; \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -q -m 'Initial commit: Vanisca Restaurant trilingual site + reservation system *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -q -m 'Add .gitattributes to normalize line endings *)
